case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. SALOMON MOISES SOSA MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SOSA MARTINEZ, SALOMON MOISES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT SALOMON MOISES SOSA MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-15-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT SALOMON MOISES SOSA MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
